outlook.reason: Recent Outlook review identified decision, review, and strategic FYI signals.

signals.summary: Susan Pi says she will approve the $9m Grumman costs. The team is ready to proceed, with a template error corrected around understated carry.
signals.actionRequest: Review whether any response or escalation is needed before or after approval proceeds.

signals.actionRequest: Review the Walden Robotics IC memo and decide whether to schedule a follow-up discussion.

signals.title: Terminal Security offering may be relevant to Essentials
signals.summary: Lisa Costello forwarded a PLDV update after a meeting with Terminal about a new security offering that could become an Essentials opportunity if the product works.
signals.actionRequest: Decide whether this should be tracked as an Operations Essentials opportunity or just monitored.
